title: 主题海报版式设计
description:
案例「type」属于海报/封面。这是一张海报/封面类案例，重点在主视觉、标题、情绪、构图和传播冲击力。适合改成活动海报、电影海报、专辑封面、产品发布海报、小红书封面或宣传 KV。

原始提示词要点：这是一条结构化提示词，原文使用 JSON/参数协议描述画面。案例类型为“2x2 网格 of promotional banner ads”，核心由 type, theme, panels 等部分组成。展示层建议不要直接暴露原始 JSON，而应转译为中文说明与可填空模板，方便用户理解画面结构、替换主题、复用版式。
prompt_raw: {"type": "2x2 grid of promotional banner ads", "theme": "Social Media Content Creation School", "panels": [{"position": "top-left", "color_palette": "light blue and pink pastel gradient", "subject": "young woman smiling, resting chin on hand, smartphone and ring light in foreground", "typography": {"headline": "発信を仕事に変える SNSスクール", "subheadings": ["好きが、私の未来になる！", "クリエイター志望歓迎！"]}, "layout_elements": {"bullet_points_count": 3, "call_to_action_button": "pink button labeled '無料体験 >'"}}, {"position": "top-right", "color_palette": "deep blue and cyan geometric", "subject": "young man looking intently at a professional camera on a tripod with a ring light", "typography": {"headline": "魅せる投稿が学べる", "subheadings": ["企画・撮影・運用サポート"]}, "layout_elements": {"circular_icons_count": 3, "icon_types": ["lightbulb", "camera", "bar chart"], "call_to_action_button": "yellow button labeled '詳細はこちら >'"}}, {"position": "bottom-left", "color_palette": "soft beige and white aesthetic", "subject": "young woman looking thoughtfully to the side, mood board background", "typography": {"headline": "自分の世界観を育てる", "subheadings": ["あなたらしさが、一番の強みになる。", "SNSブランディング講座"]}, "layout_elements": {"horizontal_icons_count": 3, "icon_types": ["palette", "person", "heart"], "call_to_action_button": "pink button labeled '今すぐ見る >'"}}, {"position": "bottom-right", "color_palette": "vibrant pink and magenta pop design", "subject": "young woman smiling brightly, pointing at text, messy bun, smartphone on tripod", "typography": {"headline": "好きな発信でファンをつくる", "subheadings": ["実践型レッスン"]}, "layout_elements": {"bullet_points_count": 4, "call_to_action_button": "yellow button labeled '申し込む >'"}}]}
prompt_display_cn:
案例「type」属于海报/封面。这是一张海报/封面类案例，重点在主视觉、标题、情绪、构图和传播冲击力。适合改成活动海报、电影海报、专辑封面、产品发布海报、小红书封面或宣传 KV。

原始提示词要点：这是一条结构化提示词，原文使用 JSON/参数协议描述画面。案例类型为“2x2 网格 of promotional banner ads”，核心由 type, theme, panels 等部分组成。展示层建议不要直接暴露原始 JSON，而应转译为中文说明与可填空模板，方便用户理解画面结构、替换主题、复用版式。
prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【主题】的【海报/封面类型】。

主视觉：
画面中心是【主视觉对象】，呈现【动作/状态/姿态】，具有强烈视觉吸引力。

标题文字：
主标题写【主标题】，副标题写【副标题】。文字位置为【文字位置】，字体风格为【字体风格】，要求清晰可读。

画面风格：
整体采用【视觉风格】，氛围为【情绪氛围】，主色调为【主色调】，光影为【光影效果】。

背景与元素：
背景包含【背景元素】，辅助元素包括【装饰元素/符号/纹理】，但不要抢夺主视觉。

构图要求：
采用【构图方式】，层次明确，适合远看抓眼、近看有细节。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【发布平台/使用场景】。
variables_json: [{"key":"field_1","label":"主题","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主题","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_2","label":"海报/封面类型","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入海报/封面类型","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_3","label":"主视觉对象","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主视觉对象","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_4","label":"动作/状态/姿态","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入动作/状态/姿态","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_5","label":"主标题","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主标题","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_6","label":"副标题","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入副标题","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_7","label":"文字位置","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入文字位置","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_8","label":"字体风格","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入字体风格","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_9","label":"视觉风格","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入视觉风格","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_10","label":"情绪氛围","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入情绪氛围","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_11","label":"主色调","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主色调","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_12","label":"光影效果","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入光影效果","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_13","label":"背景元素","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入背景元素","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"field_14","label":"装饰元素/符号/纹理","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入装饰元素/符号/纹理","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"field_15","label":"构图方式","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入构图方式","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_16","label":"画面比例","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入画面比例","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_17","label":"发布平台/使用场景","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入发布平台/使用场景","required":true,"type":"text"}]
